def f(p, *):
  pass
def f(p1, *, p1=100):
  pass

  pass
z!def f(p1, *, k1, k1=100):
  pass
def f(p1, *, **k1):
  pass

  pass
z!def f(p1, *, None, **k1):
  pass
z$def f(p, *, (k1, k2), **kw):
